content.en:
For a while, Ye Tian was completely immersed in the origin of the Hades civilization.

After six cosmic collapses, the remnants of the Hades civilization can still be preserved, which is really amazing.

Such a background is definitely not something that Ye Tian can imagine.

It's a pity that the ghost clan is stupid and hasn't received amazing inheritance and benefits from the Hades Temple, otherwise the ghost clan might have risen to become a powerful cosmic clan.

If this is the case, the human race is in the vicinity of the ghost race, and I am afraid that it will be swallowed up by the ghost race long ago.

Thankfully, it didn't happen according to this script.

This can only show that the ghost clan does not have such luck, and can only deserve to fall and become a history.

Seeing that Ye Tian was extremely shocked, the instrument spirit of the Hades Temple said: "Don't be so surprised, the Hades civilization is indeed very powerful, but it is not necessarily more powerful than the powerful forces of other universe eras. It's just that the Hades civilization is proficient in the study of the spiritual and soul level, and the ghost world ruins are only at a special spiritual level, which can greatly weaken the power of the great destruction of the universe, so that it can be preserved to the current cosmic civilization. But in terms of real combat effectiveness, the Hades civilization is not very strong, and the physical body is a huge flaw. Therefore, the Hades civilization eventually dissipated into time, and it is a pity that no transcendent person has been born so far!"

Ye Tian came back to his senses, and when he heard the Hades Temple Artifact Spirit sigh like this, he couldn't help but nod secretly.

It is indeed difficult to become a transcendent, among which the physical body is an extremely important aspect, and the Hades Temple is obviously on the wrong path, although it is studied very deeply at the spiritual level, but unfortunately there is no way to transcend this path.

As a result, the Hades civilization was doomed to dissipate.

However, the spiritual wealth of the Hades civilization is precious to future generations, and Ye Tian really wants to get the spiritual inheritance of the Hades civilization.

He believes that the three aspects of body, energy, and soul are flawless, and that true perfection is the only one.

The soul is also an extremely important aspect, so it must be lifted up.

"Master Instrument Spirit, I don't know if I have to pass any assessment to obtain the inheritance in the Hades Temple?"

Ye Tian asked.

Ji Ling said: "Anyone who comes here is treated the same. According to the difficulty of the assessment, the more assessments passed, the stronger the inheritance obtained. Remember, once you're done with the exam, you won't be able to set foot in the Temple of Hades. "

"Understood!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Let's take the test!"

Instrument Spirit Dao.

Wow.

Ye Tian found himself on a piece of land, and a soul creature suddenly appeared in front of him.

This soul creature is not weak, it is equivalent to the strength of a soul soldier.

When this soul creature saw Ye Tian, it attacked and tried to kill Ye Tian.

"Die!"

Ye Tian held the soul war spear in his hand, fusing the power of the Chaos Dao, and fiercely pierced the soul creature's head with a fierce spear, completely killing it.

One move to kill!

"Pass the first level of assessment!"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

Then, the second level arrived.

This time it was against a soul creature, but this soul creature was much more powerful than the previous soul creature.

Talent Identification
Species: Two-headed soul wolf
Soul Defense Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (70%)
Soul Claw Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (50%)
Soul Warframe Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (60%)
Purple Pupil Soul Eye Talent: Pseudo-Mystic (50%)

......

"The strength of this two-headed soul wolf is very strong, the level of various soul talents is not low, and the soul strength is even stronger than mine!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, in terms of strength, Ye Tian felt that he was still stronger than this two-headed soul wolf, after all, he also needed the blessing of other talents and the power of the Chaos Dao.

"Copy, seventy percent of the pseudo-mystic-level soul defense talent!"

"Copy, fifty percent of the soul claw talent!"

"Copy, sixty percent of the soul armor talent!"

“......"

Ye Tian copied the talent of the two-headed soul wolf one by one, once the talent of the two-headed soul wolf was fused, Ye Tian's strength would have an amazing transformation.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian's copy was completed.

Then.

The fight begins!

In the first moment, the two-headed soul wolf unleashed the Purple Pupil Soul Eye talent, and a binding force acted on Ye Tian's immortal soul, and it actually fixed Ye Tian.

Ye Tian mobilized the power of the immortal soul and the power of the Chaos Dao to break free of the power of restraint, but at this time, the claws of the two-headed soul wolf had already been caught.

Under the protection of the soul defense talent and the soul armor talent, although Ye Tian was knocked away by this two-headed soul wolf, he was not injured.

But I have to say that this purple pupil soul eye talent is indeed good.

If it is a person with average soul strength, with the cooperation of the two-headed soul wolf purple pupil soul eye talent and the soul claw talent, it is estimated that he will be killed in an instant.

After a while, Ye Tian completely suppressed this two-headed soul wolf.

In fact, Ye Tian could have killed this two-headed soul wolf very quickly, but in this case, he would soon need to face the third round of assessment.

In case, the third round is a more powerful soul creature, he may not be able to beat.

Therefore, he must take the opportunity to fuse the soul talent he had just copied to make his soul talent stronger.

As a result, Ye Tian attacked the two-headed soul wolf again and again, and after completely seriously injuring the two-headed soul wolf, he tried his best to mobilize the time talent and space talent, coupled with his own immortal soul power, suppressed the two-headed soul wolf, making it difficult for the other party to move.

Then.

"Fusion of Fifty Percent Soul Claw Talent!"

Ye Tian began to choose to fuse.

In half an hour, fifty percent of the soul claw talent was successfully fused.

Then, Ye Tian began to fuse the seventy percent pseudo-mystic-level soul defense talent.

This time, Ye Tian's soul defense talent was completely transformed, but Ye Tian relied on his amazing soul will to keep himself from losing control of his soul, otherwise the two-headed soul wolf would easily break free.

Finally, in the midst of painful suffering, Ye Tian completed the transformation of his soul defense talent.

【Soul Defense Talent: Mystery】

The mysterious-level soul defense talent, how terrifying its defense effect is!

Immediately, Ye Tian fused sixty percent of his soul armor talent, and he also successfully turned his soul armor talent into an arcane level.

And the five-percent pseudo-mystery-level purple pupil soul eye talent of the two-headed soul wolf, Ye Tian also fused.

After all of them were fused, Ye Tian looked at the two-headed soul wolf.

At this time, the two-headed soul wolf was already dying, and his soul was extremely weak.

Ye Tian activated the soul claw talent, and with a slight pinch, he directly wiped out this two-headed soul wolf.

"The second round of assessment has passed, and the third round of assessment is about to begin!"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

In the blink of an eye.

Ye Tian came to the third round of assessment space, where he saw another soul creature.

Talent Identification
Species: Celestial Soul Ape
Soul Defense Talent: Armaged
Soul Hand Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (90%)
Soul Armor Talent: Pseudo-Mystery (90%)
Soul Roar Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (80%)

......

"What a strong talent, and the soul strength of this Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape is much stronger than mine! If I hadn't fused those talents just now, I would definitely have lost!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
